definition: The experience of Jim Pike "returning" to Dick is interpreted as the "reconstitution" of a personality, serving as proof of the truth of Christianity.
interpretive_note: Extracted from analytical summaries. The experience of Jim Pike "returning" to Dick is interpreted as the "reconstitution" of a personality, serving as proof of the truth of Christianity.
